header.description: Report metadata and batch identification details.

rows.description: Detailed weighing records for each bin within a batch.

semantics: The report filters batches based on the provided date range. The `batch_id` acts as the primary grouping key. Within each batch, the 12 bins are expanded into individual rows. Calculations are performed row-by-row for error metrics and aggregated for the footer totals.
transformations: Melt the 12 bin columns (content, set_weight, actual_weight) into a single row per bin.
Calculate row-level error (Actual - Set) and percentage error.
Assign sequential row numbers starting from 1.
Sum row-level weights to calculate batch totals.
Calculate total percentage error based on aggregated sums.
